Home / Service Areas / Edmond

Landscaping in Edmond, OK

Trusted local professionals serving Edmond and surrounding communities

Serving Edmond, OK

Five Star Lawn & Hardscapes extends its expert landscaping services to the thriving community of Edmond, Oklahoma. We provide a full spectrum of services to homeowners and businesses alike, including lawn care, landscape design, hardscaping, and irrigation solutions. Our commitment is to deliver exceptional results that enhance the beauty and value of your property. Edmond's well-maintained neighborhoods and beautiful parks inspire us to create landscapes that complement the city's aesthetic. We use only the highest quality materials and proven techniques to ensure your landscape remains healthy and vibrant year-round. From custom patios to lush garden beds, we can bring your landscaping vision to life.

Edmond is known for its family-friendly atmosphere and beautifully landscaped properties. We understand the importance of maintaining a pristine outdoor space in this community and strive to exceed expectations with every project.

Landscaping Services in Edmond

Lawn Care & Maintenance

Keep your lawn healthy and vibrant with our comprehensive maintenance programs.

Learn more →

Landscape Design & Installation

Create the outdoor oasis you've always dreamed of with our design and installation services.

Learn more →

Hardscaping

Add structure and beauty to your landscape with our expert hardscaping services.

Learn more →

Outdoor Lighting

Extend the enjoyment of your outdoor space with our custom lighting solutions.

Learn more →

Irrigation Systems

Ensure efficient and reliable watering with our irrigation system installation and repair services.

Learn more →

Drainage Solutions

Protect your property from water damage with our expert drainage solutions.

Learn more →
